lines.english: Through the Perfect Guru, all this is known.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੋ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਈਐ ਸਦਾ ਸਦ ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਨਾਮੇ ਰਾਤਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: naamo naam dhiaaeeai sadaa sad ihu man naame raataa he |12|
lines.english: I meditate forever and ever on the Naam; this mind is imbued with the Naam. ||12||
Wherever I look, I see You, everywhere.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਹਿ ਜਾਵਹਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਹੀ ਬੂਝਹਿ ਇਕਨਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਪਛਾਤਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: aaveh jaaveh naam nahee boojheh ikanaa guramukh sabad pachhaataa he |13|
lines.english: They come and go, but do not understand the Naam. Some, as Gurmukh, realize the Word of the Shabad. ||13||
Imbued with the Naam, the body is sanctified.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਡੂਬਿ ਮੁਏ ਬਿਨੁ ਨੀਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: bin naavai ddoob mue bin neeraa |
lines.english: Without the Naam, they are drowned and die without water.
The Perfect True Guru has imparted this understanding.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਣੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਕਿਨੈ ਨ ਪਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: vin naavai mukat kinai na paaee |
lines.english: Without the Name, no one attains liberation.
The body-village crumbles and collapses into a pile of dust.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੇ ਨਾਮਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਸਹਜਿ ਰਹੈ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: naame naam milai vaddiaaee sehaj rahai rang raataa he |14|
lines.english: Through the Naam, the Name of the Lord, one is blessed with glorious greatness; he remains intuitively attuned to the Lord's Love. ||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚੁ ਸਲਾਹੇ ਸਾਚਿ ਸਮਾਵੈ ਜਿਨਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਏਕੋ ਜਾਤਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: saach salaahe saach samaavai jin guramukh eko jaataa he |15|
lines.english: One who knows the One Lord, through the True Guru, praises the True Lord, and remains immersed in the True Lord. ||15||
Without the Shabad, the cycle of reincarnation is not brought to an end.
When the Lord bestows His Glance of Grace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਸੋ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jis no nadar kare so paae |
lines.english: The True Word of the Shabad comes to dwell in the mind,

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਤੇ ਨਿਰੰਕਾਰੀ ਦਰਿ ਸਾਚੈ ਸਾਚੁ ਪਛਾਤਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੬॥੮॥
lines.translit: naanak naam rate nirankaaree dar saachai saach pachhaataa he |16|8|
lines.english: O Nanak, those who are attuned to the Naam, the Name of the Formless Lord, realize the True Lord in His True Court. ||16||8||
O Creator, it is You Yourself who does all.
All beings and creatures are under Your Protection.
Maaroo, Solhay, Third Mehl:
Devotion to the Lord is a treasure overflowing.
He Himself blesses us with contemplative meditation on the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਗੁਪਤੁ ਵਰਤੈ ਸਭ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਪਛਾਤਾ ਹੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aape gupat varatai sabh antar gur kai sabad pachhaataa he |1|
lines.english: You are hidden, and yet permeating within all; through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, You are realized. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੋਈ ਕਰਸਹਿ ਸਚੇ ਸਿਉ ਮਨੁ ਰਾਤਾ ਹੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jo tudh bhaavai soee karaseh sache siau man raataa he |2|
lines.english: You do whatever You please; my mind is attuned to the True Lord. ||2||
You Yourself are the priceless diamond and jewel.
In Your Mercy, You weigh with Your scale.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਅ ਜੰਤ ਸਭਿ ਸਰਣਿ ਤੁਮਾਰੀ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਆਪਿ ਪਛਾਤਾ ਹੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: jeea jant sabh saran tumaaree kar kirapaa aap pachhaataa he |3|
lines.english: All beings and creatures are under Your protection. One who is blessed by Your Grace realizes his own self. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਨਦਰਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਧੁਰਿ ਤੇਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: jis no nadar hovai dhur teree |
lines.english: One who receives Your Mercy, O Primal Lord,
Emotional attachment to Maya wells up throughout the whole world,
does not die, and is not reborn; he is released from the cycle of reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚੇ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵੈ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ਜੁਗਿ ਜੁਗਿ ਏਕੋ ਜਾਤਾ ਹੇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: saache gun gaavai din raatee jug jug eko jaataa he |4|
lines.english: He sings the Glorious Praises of the True Lord, day and night, and, throughout the ages, he knows the One Lord. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਤੁਧੁ ਭਾਣੇ ਸੇ ਨਾਮਿ ਲਾਗੇ ਗਿਆਨ ਮਤੀ ਪਛਾਤਾ ਹੇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: jo tudh bhaane se naam laage giaan matee pachhaataa he |5|
lines.english: Those who are pleasing to Your Will, are attached to the Naam; through spiritual wisdom and understanding, You are recognized. ||5||
from Brahma, Vishnu and all the demi-gods.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਸੋ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਏ ਜਿਨਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਛਾਤਾ ਹੇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: guramukh hovai so sukh paae jin guramukh naam pachhaataa he |6|
lines.english: One who becomes Gurmukh finds peace; such a Gurmukh recognizes the Naam. ||6||
The world is engrossed in vice and virtue.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਖੁ ਸੋਗੁ ਸਭੁ ਦੁਖੁ ਹੈ ਭਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: harakh sog sabh dukh hai bhaaraa |
lines.english: Happiness and misery are totally loaded with pain.
No one can erase the record of one's actions.
Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, one finds the door of salvation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰਬਿ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਸੋ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਜਿਨਿ ਆਪੁ ਮਾਰਿ ਪਛਾਤਾ ਹੇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: poorab likhiaa so fal paaeaa jin aap maar pachhaataa he |7|
lines.english: One who conquers self-conceit and recognizes the Lord, obtains the fruits of his pre-destined rewards. ||7||
In the love of duality, he will suffer terrible agony in the world hereafter.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮੋਹਿ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਉ ਚਿਤੁ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa mohi har siau chit na laagai |
lines.english: Emotionally attached to Maya, one's consciousness is not attached to the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੈ ਭਾਣੈ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: har kai bhaanai har gun gaae |
lines.english: In accordance with the Lord's Will, he sings the Glorious Praises of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲੇ ਭੇਖਧਾਰੀ ਅੰਤ ਕਾਲਿ ਪਛੁਤਾਤਾ ਹੇ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: manamukh bharam bhule bhekhadhaaree ant kaal pachhutaataa he |8|
lines.english: The hypocritical, self-willed manmukhs are deluded by doubt; at the very last moment, they regret and repent. ||8||
He is rid of all sins, and all suffering.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਨਿਰਮਲ ਹੈ ਬਾਣੀ ਹਰਿ ਸੇਤੀ ਮਨੁ ਰਾਤਾ ਹੇ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: har niramal niramal hai baanee har setee man raataa he |9|
lines.english: The Lord is immaculate, and immaculate is the Word of His Bani. My mind is imbued with the Lord. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਨੋ ਨਦਰਿ ਕਰੇ ਸੋ ਗੁਣ ਨਿਧਿ ਪਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jis no nadar kare so gun nidh paae |
lines.english: One who is blessed with the Lord's Glance of Grace, obtains the Lord, the treasure of virtue.
Egotism and possessiveness are brought to an end.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਅਵਗਣ ਕਾ ਏਕੋ ਦਾਤਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਵਿਰਲੀ ਜਾਤਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: gun avagan kaa eko daataa guramukh viralee jaataa he |10|
lines.english: The One Lord is the only Giver of virtue and vice, merits and demerits; how rare are those who, as Gurmukh, understand this. ||10||
God unites with Himself, through contemplation of the Word of the Guru's Shabad.
My God is immaculate, and utterly infinite.
